title: Efficraft
description: Simple mod that speeds up the crafting process for certain items, such as crafting chests, doors, etc. This mod allows you to skip converting one material into another, making crafting more efficient.
body:
Simple mod that speeds up the crafting process for certain items, such as crafting chests, doors, etc. This mod allows you to skip converting one material into another, making crafting more efficient.

![Craft example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a4a4d48a25af10028727ac3aa9ac56b2d0899e4.png)



Most of the new crafting recipes are related to wood, but there are a few exceptions.
